summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of 360 evaluation system v4 with real client logic. All 10 requested features working perfectly including 9-Box matrix with percentage ranges, client-specific classifications with descriptions, employee detail panels, evaluator breakdowns, 360 evaluations with competencies and values, auto-adjustable weights, public link generation, 1-5 rating scale, and dashboard statistics.
passed_tests: 9-Box Matrix displays percentage ranges (0-60%, 61-80%, 81-100%) on both VALORES and RESULTADOS axes
All 9 classification codes (A, B1-B4, C1-C4) correctly positioned based on client document percentages
Employee selection shows detailed classification descriptions (Jugador A, Quiere ser A, Difícil de Sacar/cáncer, etc.)
Recommended actions displayed for each classification (Retener y desarrollar, Coaching intensivo, Reubicar, etc.)
Evaluator breakdown shows all 5 types: Superior, Subordinados, Compañeros, Clientes, Autoevaluación with percentages
360 Evaluations displays all 4 required competencies: Liderazgo, Trabajo en equipo, Resolución de problemas, Aprendizaje continuo
360 Evaluations shows all 7 client values: Hazlo Ahora, Mejora continua, Autoaprendizaje, Alertidad, Amabilidad, Valor Agregado, Comunicación Asertiva
Auto-adjustable weights functional with 13 weight input fields maintaining 100% total
Public link generation modal opens with all 5 evaluator type buttons (Superior, Subordinados, Compañeros, Clientes, Autoevaluación)
Public evaluation form loads with employee info and 1-5 rating scale (20 total rating buttons: 4 per competency)
Dashboard shows 5 correct statistics: Empleados, Prom. Valores, Prom. Resultados, Jugadores A, Requieren Atención
Department filter functionality working in dashboard and 9-Box matrix
Manual evaluation displays 8 employees and 9 classification buttons for override functionality
Results view shows 2 chart containers with data visualization
KPIs management has all 4 tabs: Crear KPIs, Mis KPIs, Revisión, Comparativa
Navigation between all 7 main sections working seamlessly
Employee detail panel shows classification B3 'Quiere ser A' with correct description and action
Percentage scores displayed correctly (Valores: 95%, Resultados: 55% for selected employee)
Color-coded classification system working (green=A, yellow=B variants, orange/red=C variants)
Public form shows competency descriptions and interactive 1-5 rating buttons with selection feedback
Multi-step evaluation process with 'Siguiente' navigation button
Professional UI design with consistent Spanish localization and responsive layout
